description_long: This is a plush toy designed to resemble a stylized koala bear, featuring a large, rounded head with oversized ears and a prominent blue nose. The toy's face is adorned with long, blue eyelashes and a small, subtle smile, giving it a gentle and sleepy expression. Its body is compact and rounded, with short arms outstretched to the sides and short legs, all proportionally smaller than the head. The surface appears soft and smooth, likely made from a fabric material, with visible stitching lines around the limbs and head. The color palette is primarily a pale grayish-white with blue accents on the nose, eyelashes, and lower body. There are no visible clothing items or accessories, and the toy is free of any branding or logos.
description: A soft, stylized koala plush toy with a large blue nose, long blue eyelashes, and outstretched arms. Its body is pale grayish-white with blue accents and a gentle, sleepy expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the koala's large blue nose, long blue eyelashes, and subtle smile, with both arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the head and ears, with the blue nose and eyelashes visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, with the rounded ears and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the head's thickness and the outstretched arm.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is gentle and sleepy, with closed eyes accentuated by long blue eyelashes and a small, subtle smile.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms outstretched to the sides and legs slightly apart.
